message:
feat(grpc): add prost-based protobuf codec for gRPC

Introduce a prost-based Protocol Buffer codec implementing the gRPC
Codec trait for encoding and decoding protobuf messages.

Features:
- ProstCodec<T, U>: Generic codec for request/response types
- Zero-copy decoding where possible
- Configurable message size limits (default 4MB)
- Deterministic encoding for consistent wire format
- Unknown field preservation via prost's default behavior
- Cancel-safe: all operations are synchronous

Integrates with the existing gRPC framing infrastructure for
complete gRPC protocol support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
